text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The reported issue should be fixed now with this change: 

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/net/asterisk/Makefile?rev=1.103 

Please update your ports tree and try again. Let me know if it still doesn't 
work. 

Thank you for reporting!
